name: NATIONAL PRESTO INDUSTRIES INC
summary: National Presto Industries operates three segments: Housewares/Small Appliance (pressure cookers, kitchen electrics, comfort appliances sold primarily in the US and Canada); Defense (manufactures 40mm ammunition, cartridge cases, detonators, and performs Load, Assemble and Pack operations for the US Department of Defense and prime contractors); and Safety (smoke, carbon monoxide alarms and PFAS-Free Foam fire extinguishers via startup Rely Innovations, Inc.).

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
